title: John Guest Speedfit PEMSTC1514 15 mm x 1/2 inch BSP Straight Tap Connector
features: Suitable for domestic hot and cold water
Simple push fit action enables easy installation
Truly demountable without damage to pipe or fitting
No risk of fire or flames
Twist and Lock safeguard for extra security
description: Product Description Why Choose JG Speedfit? JG Speedfit push-fit plumbing and heating • Install, demount and refit in seconds without tools • Safer and cleaner with no hot works, flux or glue • Less labour-intensive, especially in tight spaces • Non-toxic, resists corrosion and scale build-up • High performance leakproof connections / compatible with plastic or copper pipe How to make a connection - Standard Fittings Standard Fittings Push pipe up to Pipe Stop. If the Speedfit pipe has been cut correctly the insertion mark on the pipe will be level with the collet head Standard Fittings Pull to check connection is secure and test the system Twist & Lock Fittings Twist & Lock Fittings Twist the screwcap until it touches the body flange. This increases the O-Ring seal around the pipe and locks the pipe into position Twist & Lock Fittings If you are not using collet clips, ensure that the screwcaps are in the locked position. Pull to check it is secure An Icon of quality Premium Piece On every product John Guest Speedfit make, you’ll find the JG monogram proudly stamped, as a mark of trusted authenticity and quality. All their products are pressure and temperature tested to ensure they meet and exceed exacting industry standards.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎1 x 15 x 1/2 inch Tap Connector Straight
